[TIMELINE 2ND F1TENTH KOREA CHAMPIONSHIP](../index.html)

## TIMELINE 2ND F1TENTH KOREA CHAMPIONSHIP

  


DATE | IN-PERSON COMPETITION  
---|---  
May 25th | [Registration opens](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1ycNog7lz3oYiwzHIJfmzt0CW0E1GGCBMy1FUQ7ij1AI/viewform?edit_requested=true)  
Aug 7th - 9th | F1Tenth Boot Camp  
Sep 8th   
19:00 KST | Orientation (Online Meeting)   
[Meeting Link](https://unist-kr.zoom.us/j/87812180691)   
Demonstrate expectations, prospective participants can ask questions  
Sep 16th | Technology Exchange Conference  
Sep 17th   
23:59 KST | Registration closes  
Oct 17th | Track Setup & Teams Training   
All Teams can use the racetrack after 3pm.  
Oct 18th | Teams Training   
Qualification Session (14:00 KST)  
Oct 19th | Race day (10:00 KST)   
Award Ceremony
